title: Crunchy Turkish Fish Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly floral dish featuring white fish fillets, seasoned with tandoori spices and served over a bed of crispy vegetables for a crunchy texture.

ingredients.name: White Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Choose mild flavored fish such as cod or haddock.

ingredients.name: Turkish Tadka Seasoning Blend
ingredients.notes: Preferably organic and kid-friendly if available.

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add ginger garlic paste and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Dissolve tadka seasoning blend into the oil and stir for another minute.
Fold in turmeric powder, cumin seeds, coriander powder, and red chili paste, cooking for an additional minute to release flavors.
Gently add fish fillets with skin side down. Cook for about 3 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through.
In a separate pan, sauté sliced onions, bell peppers, and carrots in the tadka oil mixture till slightly caramelized, adding enough water to cover them if needed.
Combine stir-fried fish with vegetables and serve immediately.
